headline: Iran’s Revolutionary Guard Threatens to Strike U.S. Companies in Mideast

In what it labeled “Statement No. 51,” the Revolutionary Guard asserted American information and communications technology and artificial intelligence firms play a central role in identifying and tracking targets.

headline: Google, Meta ruling could be a Tobacco Moment for social media cases

headline: The S&P 500 Is Falling, but Stock Market Breadth Is Good
